name: Santa Fe Chicken Tortellini Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Cook and drain the tortellini according to package directions.
3. While the tortellini is cooking, grease a 3-quart casserole dish.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Cook broccoli, onion, and bell pepper in the oil for about 3 minutes, stirring frequently until crisp-tender. Remove broccoli mixture from the skillet.
6. In the same skillet, cook flour and 2 tablespoons oil over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
7. Stir in milk, broth, and cumin. Heat to boiling over medium heat, stirring constantly; remove from heat.
8. Stir in chicken, Monterey Jack cheese, tortellini, and broccoli mixture into the casserole dish.
9. Bake uncovered for 25 to 35 minutes or until bubbly. During the last 5 minutes of baking, sprinkle with Colby cheese and tortilla chips; bake until cheese is melted.
